-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(omrade) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, localid, navnerom, oppdateringsdato, datauttaksdato, malemetode, opphav, omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204'));

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer to use as spatial filter

2.description: retrieve stormflo200ar_klimaarna polygons that intersect the municipality extent (use bbox from step 1 to limit the national layer)

3.description: retrieve buildings in Kristiansand using kommunenummer filter from step 1

4.description: retrieve fylke polygons that intersect the municipality extent (use bbox from step 1)

5.description: compute distances between buildings (step 3) and storm polygons (step 2)

6.description: keep only building-storm pairs where distance_m <= 50

7.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance_m and keep building attributes and geometry for downstream joins

8.description: attach fylke (county) attributes (fylkesnavn) to the buildings by spatial intersection with fylke polygons (step 4)

9.description: sort buildings by distance_m ascending, tie-breaker objid ascending
